description_long: This is a brown bottle with a long, narrow neck and a wider base, featuring a yellow label on its main body. The label displays a stylized logo with the word 'BENDER' and an illustrated hand holding a bottle, along with some additional text and decorative elements. The bottle appears to be made of plastic or glass, with a matte finish and no visible transparency, making it difficult to see any contents inside. The cap is integrated and matches the color of the bottle, suggesting a screw cap design. The surface is smooth and hard, with no visible signs of damage or wear. The overall design is typical for beverage bottles found in urban environments such as streets, parks, or garages.
description: A brown bottle with a yellow label featuring a logo and text, smooth and opaque with a matching cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow label with a prominent logo and text, as well as the bottle's full shape.
description_view_1: Side view with the label partially visible, showing the bottle's cylindrical form and the transition from the neck to the body.
description_view_2: Rear view with the plain yellow label and no visible branding or text, highlighting the bottle's symmetry.
description_view_3: Angled rear view with the label wrapping around, no visible logo or text, emphasizing the bottle's smooth surface.
attribute_label_or_branding: Yellow label with a logo featuring the word 'BENDER', an illustrated hand holding a bottle, and some additional text and decorative elements in white and black.
